entities.name: GROUNDNUT

entities.description: The increase in the average genetic merit of a population over time

entities.description: The speed and accuracy of measuring physical traits

entities.description: The ability of a crop to perform well in different environments

entities.name: POSTHARVEST ASSESSMENT
entities.description: Evaluation of crop quality and yield after harvest

entities.name: TPE CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: Method to define representative trial locations and map field variability

entities.description: Use of drones to capture canopy and field data

entities.name: RGB SENSORS
entities.description: Sensors capturing red, green, and blue light for imagery

entities.name: MULTISPECTRAL SENSORS
entities.description: Sensors capturing multiple specific wavelengths of light

entities.name: CANOPY COVER
entities.description: The proportion of ground covered by the crop canopy

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living biological organisms in a given area

entities.name: LEASYSCAN
entities.description: High-throughput phenotyping platform for trait evaluation

entities.name: EARLY VIGOR
entities.description: The initial growth rate and strength of a seedling

entities.name: CANOPY ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The process of the crop canopy filling the available space

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of biomass produced to water consumed

entities.name: HARVESTMASTER
entities.description: Tool used to correct yields based on moisture content

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water contained in the harvested grain

entities.name: CT IMAGING
entities.description: Non-destructive imaging method for internal seed/kernel evaluation

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The ratio of kernel weight to total pod weight

entities.name: KERNEL WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of an individual seed or kernel

entities.name: GRADE
entities.description: The quality classification of the groundnut kernels

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL PROFILING
entities.description: The process of determining the nutritional composition of a crop

entities.name: NIRS
entities.description: Spectroscopy method for rapid chemical analysis

entities.name: FATTY ACID PROFILING
entities.description: Analysis of the types and amounts of fatty acids in the oil

entities.name: OLEIC ACID CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of oleic acid in groundnut oil

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International research organization conducting the breeding program

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to withstand climate-related stresses
